The Bad Guys (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $97,787,945Details
International Box Office $153,373,095
Worldwide Box Office $251,161,040
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,975,955
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,083,055
Total $10,059,010
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After a lifetime of pulling legendary heists, five notorious bad guys—Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula—attempt their most challenging job yet…going good.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$23,950,245 (24.5% of total gross)
Legs:4.08 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,009 opening theaters/4,042 max. theaters, 8.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $111,013,541

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 22nd, 2022 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: March 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Egypt)
March 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Bolivia)
March 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Lebanon)
March 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Malaysia)
March 17th, 2022 (Wide), released as Die Gangster Gang (Ecuador)
Video Release: June 7th, 2022 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for action and rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2712 (cert #53555), 12/22/2021)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Franchise: The Bad Guys
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead

Social setting: Crime Caper
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Comedy

Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Animation
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
